easy.subject: You won a new iPhone!
easy.body: Click here to claim your free iPhone 15 Pro Max. Offer expires in 2 hours!

easy.subject: Question about my recent invoice
easy.body: I noticed an extra $50 charge on my last invoice. Can someone explain what this is for?

easy.subject: Cannot reset password
easy.body: I am trying to reset my account password but the link is broken. Please help.

easy.subject: Hours of operation?
easy.body: Are you guys open on national holidays? I couldn't find this info on the website.

easy.subject: Cheap prescriptions online
easy.body: Get your prescriptions at 90% off. No doctor visit required.

easy.subject: Credit card expired
easy.body: My card on file expired and my subscription was paused. How do I update my payment method?

easy.subject: App keeps crashing on Android
easy.body: Ever since the last update, the app crashes immediately upon opening. I am using a Galaxy S22.

easy.subject: Do you offer student discounts?
easy.body: I am currently enrolled in university. Is there a student discount available for your pro plan?

easy.subject: Enlarge your business potential
easy.body: We guarantee to put you on page 1 of Google in 24 hours. Reply for details.

easy.subject: Double billed this month
easy.body: I checked my statement and I was charged twice for the monthly service fee. Please refund the duplicate.

easy.subject: API rate limit error
easy.body: We are getting a 429 Too Many Requests error on the v2 API endpoint despite being well under our quota.

easy.subject: Where is the documentation?
easy.body: I can't seem to find the integration guide for the new dashboard. Can someone send a link?

easy.subject: Hot singles in your area
easy.body: Meet someone tonight! Click here to see profiles near you.

easy.subject: Need invoice for tax purposes
easy.body: Please provide a PDF copy of our October invoice. We need it for tax filing.

easy.subject: Syncing is stuck
easy.body: The desktop client has been saying 'Syncing... 99%' for the past three hours.

medium.subject: URGENT: Production Database DOWN
medium.body: Our main database went offline 5 minutes ago and we are losing revenue. We need immediate assistance!

medium.subject: URGENT: Account suspended erroneously
medium.body: Our enterprise account was just suspended for non-payment, but we paid our bill last week. Fix this immediately.

medium.subject: Sync up this Friday?
medium.body: Can we schedule a quick 15-minute call this Friday to discuss the upcoming Q3 campaign?

medium.subject: Interested in Enterprise pricing
medium.body: We are looking to roll out your software to 5,000 employees. Could we get a quote for an enterprise license?

medium.subject: Q2 All-Hands Recording
medium.body: For those who missed yesterday's all-hands meeting, the recording is now available on the intranet.

medium.subject: Security Breach Suspected - ESCALATE
medium.body: We detected unauthorized access originating from your service's IP addresses. We need a security engineer on a call right now.

medium.subject: Do you support French?
medium.body: I am wondering if your platform has a French language localization option available.

medium.subject: Bitcoin investment opportunity!
medium.body: Double your money in 24 hours with our guaranteed trading bots. Click here to deposit.

medium.subject: Export feature failing
medium.body: Whenever I try to export the weekly report to CSV, it generates an empty file.

medium.subject: Wrong billing address on invoice
medium.body: Our latest invoice shows our old address. Can you update it to the new one in Chicago and reissue?

medium.subject: Can we get a demo?
medium.body: I saw your product on ProductHunt and I'd love a personalized demo for my team of 10.

medium.subject: Reminder: Complete your compliance training
medium.body: This is a reminder that the annual security compliance training is due by the end of the week.

medium.subject: URGENT: Incorrect funds transferred
medium.body: The latest batch transfer was off by $100,000. Stop all processing immediately until we resolve this.

medium.subject: Is there a free trial?
medium.body: I want to try your software for a class project. Do you offer a 14-day free trial?

medium.subject: Your package is waiting
medium.body: We missed you! Pay the $2.99 redelivery fee here or your package will be destroyed.

medium.subject: SSO integration broken
medium.body: Our SAML SSO integration started throwing a 500 error this morning. Users cannot log in.

medium.subject: Receipt request
medium.body: Could you send me a receipt for the payment I made yesterday? Just need it for my records.

medium.subject: Add more seats to our plan
medium.body: We just hired 5 new designers. How do we go about adding them to our current team plan?

medium.subject: Office fridge cleaning this Friday
medium.body: Please remove all personal items from the 3rd floor fridge by 4 PM on Friday. Anything left will be thrown away.

medium.subject: Reschedule our kick-off?
medium.body: I have a conflict for tomorrow's kick-off call. Can we move it to Thursday at 2 PM?

medium.subject: URGENT: Legal request for data hold
medium.body: Attached is a court order requiring an immediate freeze on data deletion for account ID #88921. Escalate to your legal/compliance team immediately.

medium.subject: What are the specs?
medium.body: Where can I find the detailed hardware specifications for the v3 routers?

medium.subject: You have a new secure message
medium.body: Click the link to view your secure encrypted document. Login required.

medium.subject: Latency spikes in US-East
medium.body: Automated alert: P99 latency in US-East region has exceeded 500ms for the last 15 minutes.

medium.subject: Lunch with the CEO next week
medium.body: Are you available next Tuesday for a quick lunch to discuss the Q4 roadmap?

hard.subject: Something is wrong with my account
hard.body: Hi, I logged in today and things look weird. Can someone help?

hard.subject: Re: Something is wrong with my account
hard.body: Just to clarify, all my dashboard widgets are throwing a '500 Server Error' when they try to load data.

hard.subject: Re: Something is wrong with my account
hard.body: Now it's completely down and our entire company can't work. This needs to be escalated immediately!

hard.subject: Question about pricing
hard.body: I saw your pricing page, but I am not sure which tier fits us. We have 50 users.

hard.subject: Re: Question about pricing
hard.body: Actually, looking closer, we also need custom SAML integration. Can we get an enterprise quote drafted?

hard.subject: Q3 Planning Offsite
hard.body: Team, we need to finalize the location for the Q3 offsite. Please submit your ideas by EOD.

hard.subject: Re: Q3 Planning Offsite
hard.body: Can we schedule a 30-min sync tomorrow to go over the top 3 location choices?

hard.subject: Re: Q3 Planning Offsite
hard.body: Yes, I just sent a calendar invite for 2 PM tomorrow. Let's make a final decision then.

hard.subject: Payment failed?
hard.body: I got an email saying my payment failed, but I haven't changed my card.

hard.subject: Re: Payment failed?
hard.body: I figured it out, my bank flagged it as fraud. I cleared it up, please try running the charge again.

hard.subject: Bug report: UI glitch on login
hard.body: The login button overlaps with the footer on mobile screens. Just a minor CSS issue.

hard.subject: Re: Bug report: UI glitch on login
hard.body: Wait, it's not just CSS. Clicking the button actually submits the form multiple times.

hard.subject: Re: Bug report: UI glitch on login
hard.body: This is critical. The multiple submissions are bypassing rate limits and locking users out entirely.

hard.subject: Re: Bug report: UI glitch on login
hard.body: Paging anyone! We have thousands of locked-out accounts. This is a P0 incident.

hard.subject: Who is our account manager?
hard.body: Our previous account manager left. Who has taken over our account?

hard.subject: Re: Who is our account manager?
hard.body: Following up on this as we want to discuss upgrading our plan for next quarter.

hard.subject: Final Notice: Domain Expiry
hard.body: Your domain is about to expire. Pay $150 now to avoid losing your website.

hard.subject: You have been chosen
hard.body: Claim your inheritance of 4 million dollars. Send your bank details immediately.

hard.subject: URGENT: Legal Notice of Infringement
hard.body: We represent [Client]. You are currently hosting stolen IP. Take it down in 24 hours or face a lawsuit.

hard.subject: CRITICAL: Data Leak Discovered
hard.body: I have found an unsecured S3 bucket belonging to your company containing PII. Please contact me immediately.

hard.subject: New expense policy
hard.body: Please review the updated travel and expense policy attached. Meals are now capped at $50/day.

hard.subject: Welcome to the team!
hard.body: Everyone, please welcome our new frontend engineer, Sarah, to the team!

hard.subject: Requesting a code review meeting
hard.body: Can we get the lead engineers in a room tomorrow to review the architecture proposal?

hard.subject: Availability for next week?
hard.body: I have a few great candidates for the open PM role. When are you free to interview them next week?

hard.subject: Interested in cross-promotion
hard.body: We'd love to partner with you for a joint webinar. Who handles your co-marketing efforts?

hard.subject: RFP Response needed
hard.body: Please find attached the RFP for the new state software initiative. Bids are due by the 15th.

hard.subject: Wire transfer delayed
hard.body: Our bank is holding the recent wire transfer for compliance checks. Could you provide the SWIFT details again?

hard.subject: Can I get a refund?
hard.body: I forgot to cancel my trial and was charged. I haven't used the product at all. Please refund me.

hard.subject: Webhook delivery failing
hard.body: We have seen a 100% failure rate delivering webhooks to your endpoint over the last hour.

hard.subject: Address for sending a gift?
hard.body: Your support team was so helpful last week! Where can I send a box of cookies to the team?
